title: Google Flow Beta
description:
Google Flow Beta

Step into your AI creative studio with Google Flow app, built with and for creatives. Create and refine images and videos using Google’s most advanced generative models, now right from your phone.

FROM CAPTURE TO CREATION
Use direct camera roll and live camera uploads to ground your image and video generations in your own personal experiences.

YOUR CREATIVE STUDIO, SYNCED
Take your work anywhere. Access your projects and assets through a unified library that stays in sync with your desktop experience.

GET NOTIFICATIONS IN REAL-TIME
Don't wait around for your work to render. Run multiple image and video generations in the background, and get a notification when your media is ready.

DOWNLOAD AND SHARE YOUR CREATIONS
Once your vision is realized, download your creations to your device for easy sharing.
